segments.text: i blow up every time something bad
happens to me and i can't control it one
way to be non-reactive or calm during a
bad situation is to consider your
contribution to the disaster before you
react uncontrollably pause for a second
and think what stupid thing did i do
that led to this problem what you are
doing here is getting out of the victim
mindset and taking control by taking
your fair share of responsibility it's
